lists.0: Without TCU (Not activate USB DTC detection nor MCAN communication)
lists.1: With eCall (Not activate USB DTC detection but activate MCAN communication)
lists.2: Without TCU or With eCall (Use MCAN auto-configuration. Not activate USB DTC detection even if TCU is auto-configured)
lists.5: With TCU (Activate USB DTC detection and MCAN communication)
lists.6: Without TCU or with TCU (Use MCAN auto-configuration. Activate USB DTC detection if TCU is auto-configured)

lists.7: France specific  : Group 1 + Group 2 + Group 3 + Group 4
